现实世界描写多，因为会被系统影响，有玩家影响现实"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772187254,"group_id":"7562011170333281342","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"社恐 i 人，认知存在不足，在努力学习中","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0tKt+JMOMEGYAOJnqZHtJQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/78c46973ff8c4c37a2f9324979a64b2e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776614509&x-signature=x0fCuk2VGfXj9ACpMQRcnIaCnoU%3D","user_id":"215974216221479","user_name":"莫斯蓝尔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"215974216221479","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7562011170333281342","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+女强无cp+脑洞悬疑+推理智斗+微群像+无辱女词+中式神话背景】
“叮，欢迎绑定无限流系统[灵虚幻境]，请选择您的神之途径。”
“这里有四位神明供您追随，月神恒我，昆仑战神西王母，天机之神九天玄女……”
刚洗白的杀手安喜乐，依旧无法割舍对力量的追求，肉体凡胎还是太弱了——结果一睁眼就进入了无限流游戏。
已准备在恐怖游戏里大杀四方的安喜乐，发现惊悚无限流还有悬疑推理元素？！
没关系，动脑子，她也很擅长的！
失散多年的好友乐平安，也在游戏中与安喜乐相遇了。但是，她好像跟印象中有些不一样了？
现实中，也突然出现了一些科学无法解释的现象。安喜乐知道，这是有人在用系统给予的权柄，开始影响现实……
女神的游戏，从不是没有目的。
【副本1：暗黑仙侠·多人】
【副本2：校园规则怪谈·单人】
【副本3：美妙之家·4女】
……
（先加个书架呗，各位妈咪们）
（略慢热，女主需过首个副本才能选女神途径。官方有意吸纳女主，女主选择建立只有自己和闺蜜的公会，但需要帮助时也会出手）
（女主对外冷淡，内心戏足，闷骚吐槽役）
（女人间的【友谊】与【勾心斗角·褒义】，枭姬英雌你来我往）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/f89dfb6ec5489d1a260533f462e6dd29~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"姜尔玉","author_id":"","book_id":"7562011170333281342","book_name":"杀手在无限流转行做悬疑推理了？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1209人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":537,"name":"惊悚游戏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=537&name=惊悚游戏&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7605133595077788184","read_count":"1209","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"133026"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"56","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,规则怪谈,无CP,女强,惊悚游戏,无限流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f89dfb6ec5489d1a260533f462e6dd29~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779256818&x-signature=OgJPZj8OFx6iERRGydcbfQlRF0g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"743734024080344","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"31"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321140018E640DC143ED942FF3 E14"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":154},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1772942404,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614126026834363160","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"特别棒的一本小说 感觉很适合改编成剧本杀 （？）喜欢剧本杀的绝对是不可多得的一本好书 作者可能是因为现实也是笔者的工作 文笔很棒 所以没有那种青涩的感觉
    必须要夸一夸这个是世界观设定 同时兼具好懂和庞大可不是一件容易的事 这种融合了中国神话的感觉就很棒既好理解又足够有想象力 其他作者都来学学 （指指点点）而且系统的身份很简单的就说明了就喜欢这种不拖泥带水的 女娲娘娘还是太权威了😭 而且你们懂我听到一句恒我的救赎感吗！！真的眼前一亮阿喂！！喜欢中国神话的也来看

还有就是女主真的太萌了😭！！小个子萌萌罒ω罒 桃夭也好萌😭 何时能有百合cp （bs） 有一点特别棒 就是这个杀手她不超雄 我已经好久没有看到不超雄的杀手了 这本书还有一点女强文不是靠踩男踩出来的 而是靠女主自己的强大的人格 而且不是全部的男性角色都很坏 感觉出场的这几个男性角色都算是有自己性格的 很棒了！

    最后后期一定要少刀点人啊😭 一定要活着阿喂！！所以说前期给我一种人都会死死的感觉（对不起）求成熟魅惑大姐姐角色 （不要骂我）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772804008,"group_id":"7562011170333281342","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"盲女激推","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nye1xGhgNKMLv5RyrGf8zR0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/acae84845d3b4e35af20c590b5f708ff~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623735&x-signature=y5Dvu8NUH%2F6ESzMXQUy%2BRkRn414%3D","user_id":"679954344052836","user_name":"一个马桶（雷自首梗）"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"679954344052836","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7562011170333281342","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流+女强无cp+脑洞悬疑+推理智斗+微群像+无辱女词+中式神话背景】
